title: podman: new option --conmon-pidfile=
body:
so that it is possible to use systemd to automatically restart the
container:

[Service]
Type=forking
PIDFile=/run/awesome-service.pid
ExecStart=/usr/bin/podman --conmon-pidfile=/run/awesome-service.pid run --name awesome -d IMAGE /usr/bin/do-something
ExecStopPost=/usr/bin/podman rm awesome
Restart=always

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: It requires this change in conmon: https://github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/pull/1469
@giuseppe Is the PID file something we have to delete before restarting conmon?
